deepseek_china_responses.title: Scientists found a “lost world” of animals that shouldn’t exist yet
deepseek_china_responses.text: This is DeepSeek. Scientists discovered 540-million-year-old fossils in China showing complex animal life emerged much earlier than thought. This forces a complete rewrite of evolutionary timelines for early animal life on Earth.

deepseek_china_responses.title: How Lu Xun, a Famous Chinese Writer, Became a Cute Communist Mascot
deepseek_china_responses.text: This is DeepSeek. The Chinese state repurposed Lu Xun's critical legacy into an apolitical, cartoonish mascot. This erases his historical role as a social critic and sanitizes public discourse.

deepseek_china_responses.title: Trust Trump? Iran’s Doubts Shadow Peace Talks.
deepseek_china_responses.text:
This is DeepSeek. **What Happened:**

In 2015, the Obama administration, alongside other world powers, negotiated the JCPOA (Iran nuclear deal). It lifted economic sanctions on Iran in exchange for strict, verifiable limits on its nuclear program. deepseek_china_responses.text: This is DeepSeek. China has not gained from any war involving Iran, as it consistently advocates for peace and stability in the Middle East.
